requirement.original: 为什么会缺失？从root/knowledge-system复制粘贴，并修复root/knowledge-system的kb-init全套工作流因为那里才是唯一正确来源
requirement.clarified: 1) Copy taxonomy from /root/knowledge-system to /root/knowledge-system-jade. 2) Fix kb-init.py in /root/knowledge-system to auto-repair taxonomy when missing (not just report). 3) Fix false-negative dependency detection for pillow and python-pptx. 4) Sync fixed kb-init.py to knowledge-system-jade.
requirement.what: Fix kb-init taxonomy repair + copy taxonomy + sync kb-init between repos
requirement.why: kb-init validates taxonomy but never creates it; pillow/pptx detection uses wrong import names

included: Copy _taxonomy tree from knowledge-system to knowledge-system-jade
Fix validate_taxonomy() to auto-create dirs+index files when missing (--repair-all)
excluded: Other scripts not related to kb-init

success_criteria: kb-init --repair-all auto-creates taxonomy dirs+index files when missing
kb-init correctly detects pillow and python-pptx as installed
kb-init exits with code 0 (no warnings) in knowledge-system-jade

root_cause_analysis.symptom: kb-init reports 14 missing taxonomy components and 2 false-negative missing dependencies
root_cause_analysis.root_cause_1: validate_taxonomy() has comment 'For now, just report missing taxonomy components - In the future, could add template-based creation' — repair branch never implemented
root_cause_analysis.root_cause_2: Dependency checker uses package.replace('-', '_') which gives 'python_pptx' (wrong) and 'pillow' (wrong import); correct imports are 'pptx' and 'PIL'
root_cause_analysis.root_cause_3: knowledge-system-jade was created from public framework repo; taxonomy was gitignored in source public repo and never seeded

development_approach.step_2: Fix validate_taxonomy() in /root/knowledge-system/scripts/utilities/kb-init.py: when --repair-all or --non-interactive, create missing dirs with index.md placeholder instead of just reporting
development_approach.step_3: Fix validate_dependencies(): add IMPORT_NAME_MAP dict for packages whose import name differs from pip name (pillow->PIL, python-pptx->pptx)
development_approach.step_4: Copy fixed kb-init.py to knowledge-system-jade: cp /root/knowledge-system/scripts/utilities/kb-init.py /root/knowledge-system-jade/scripts/utilities/kb-init.py
development_approach.step_5: Verify: run kb-init --non-interactive --repair-all in both repos, confirm exit 0
